scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --filter '!@workspace/mockup-sandbox' --if-present run build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter ./workers/edge-proxy run test --run && pnpm --filter @workspace/syrabit run test
scripts.deploy:pages: pnpm dlx wrangler@4 pages deploy artifacts/syrabit/dist --project-name=${CF_PAGES_PROJECT_NAME:-syrabit-analytics} --branch=${CF_PAGES_BRANCH:-master} --commit-dirty=true
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.verify: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run verify:jsonld
